name: Korean Beta / Launch
description: MapleStory officially launches in South Korea after beta testing. The 2D side-scrolling MMORPG introduces a colorful world with Warriors, Magicians, Bowmen, and Thieves as the original four class branches. Victoria Island serves as the main continent.
description_ko: 메이플스토리가 베타 테스트를 거쳐 한국에서 정식 출시되었다. 2D 횡스크롤 MMORPG로 전사, 마법사, 궁수, 도적의 4개 직업군과 함께 빅토리아 아일랜드를 중심으로 한 화려한 세계를 선보였다.
key_changes: Original four class branches: Warrior, Magician, Bowman, Thief
Victoria Island as the main continent
key_changes_ko: 전사, 마법사, 궁수, 도적 4대 직업군 도입
community_impact: Created an entirely new genre experience in Korea. The free-to-play 2D MMORPG attracted millions of young players and became a cultural phenomenon, establishing PC bang culture around the game.

name: 4th Job Advancement
description: The long-awaited 4th job advancement arrives, giving all four original explorer classes their ultimate forms. New powerful skills, Horntail boss raid, and level 200 as the aspirational endgame goal. Leafre continent opens with dragon-themed content.
description_ko: 오랫동안 기다려온 4차 전직이 도입되어 4대 모험가 직업군이 최종 형태를 갖추게 되었다. 강력한 신규 스킬, 혼테일 보스 레이드, 레벨 200이라는 엔드게임 목표가 추가되었다. 리프레 대륙이 드래곤 테마 콘텐츠와 함께 오픈되었다.
key_changes: 4th job skills for all Explorer classes
Massive power spike for endgame players
community_impact: Reaching level 200 became the ultimate badge of honor. Horntail raids created the first true guild-based endgame community, and 4th job skills like Genesis and Meteor Shower became iconic.

name: Pirates
description: The fifth class branch, Pirates, joins MapleStory. Featuring Buccaneers who fight with bare fists and knuckles, and Corsairs who wield guns and summon battleships. Nautilus port becomes the Pirate hub.
description_ko: 5번째 직업군인 해적이 메이플스토리에 합류했다. 주먹과 너클로 싸우는 바이퍼와 총을 들고 배틀쉽을 소환하는 캡틴이 등장했다. 노틸러스 항구가 해적의 거점이 되었다.
key_changes: New Pirate class branch with two paths
community_impact: Pirates brought fresh energy to the game. Buccaneers with their Dragon Strike and Corsairs with Battleship became fan favorites. The addition of a fifth class branch was a landmark moment.

name: Cygnus Knights
description: The Cygnus Knights are introduced as a new class branch under Empress Cygnus. Five new classes mirror the original Explorers but with unique elemental twists. Capped at level 120 with a special ultimate skill that transfers to Explorer characters.
description_ko: 시그너스 여제 휘하의 시그너스 기사단이 새로운 직업군으로 추가되었다. 5개 신규 직업이 기존 모험가를 기반으로 고유한 원소 특성을 가졌다. 레벨 120 제한이 있었으며 모험가에게 전수되는 특별한 궁극기가 특징이었다.
key_changes: Level 120 cap with blessing transfer to Explorers
Ereve floating island as KoC hub
community_impact: Created the concept of 'link skills' and cross-character benefits that would become central to modern MapleStory. Many players made KoC characters specifically for the blessing transfer.

name: Aran / Evan
description: The first Hero classes debut with Aran, the legendary polearm warrior, and Evan, the Dragon Master successor to Freud. These classes introduce unique combo and dragon partner mechanics, beginning the Heroes of Maple storyline.
description_ko: 최초의 영웅 직업인 아란(전설의 폴암 전사)과 에반(프리드의 후계자, 드래곤 마스터)이 등장했다. 고유한 콤보 시스템과 드래곤 파트너 메카닉을 도입하며 메이플 영웅 스토리라인의 시작을 알렸다.
key_changes: Rien Island for Aran, farm for Evan
community_impact: Aran's combo system was revolutionary and made leveling feel dynamic. Evan's dragon Mir became one of the most beloved NPCs. These classes set the template for future story-driven class releases.

name: Big Bang
description: The most significant update in MapleStory history. Completely revamped the game with new maps, rebalanced all classes, restructured the world map, and introduced a streamlined leveling system. EXP curves were dramatically flattened, making leveling far faster.
description_ko: 메이플스토리 역사상 가장 큰 업데이트. 새로운 맵, 전 직업 리밸런스, 월드맵 재구성, 간소화된 레벨링 시스템 도입으로 게임을 완전히 개편했다. 경험치 곡선이 대폭 완화되어 레벨링 속도가 크게 빨라졌다.
community_impact: Divided the community between those who embraced modern MapleStory and those who longed for the pre-BB experience. Sparked the 'old maple' nostalgia movement that persists to this day.

name: Legends
description: A wave of new Hero classes floods MapleStory. Mercedes the Dual Bowgun Elf Queen, Demon Slayer the betrayer of the Black Mage, and Phantom the legendary thief who steals skills from other classes all arrive in rapid succession.
description_ko: 새로운 영웅 직업들이 메이플스토리에 대거 등장했다. 듀얼 보우건의 엘프 여왕 메르세데스, 검은 마법사를 배신한 데몬슬레이어, 다른 직업의 스킬을 훔치는 전설의 도적 팬텀이 연이어 출시되었다.
key_changes: Mercedes: Dual Bowgun elf queen with combo chains
key_changes_ko: 메르세데스: 듀얼 보우건 엘프 여왕, 콤보 체인
community_impact: Phantom's skill-stealing mechanic was one of the most creative designs ever. Link Skills became essential for character progression, encouraging players to create multiple characters.

name: Tempest
description: Tempest brings Luminous the light/dark mage hero, Kaiser the dragon warrior of Grandis, and Angelic Buster the idol-themed magical girl. The Grandis dimension is introduced as a new world alongside Maple World.
description_ko: 템페스트 업데이트로 빛과 어둠의 마법사 영웅 루미너스, 그란디스의 드래곤 전사 카이저, 아이돌 테마의 마법소녀 엔젤릭버스터가 등장했다. 메이플 월드와 함께 새로운 차원인 그란디스가 도입되었다.
key_changes: Angelic Buster: Soul Shooter idol class
community_impact: Grandis opened up massive new lore possibilities. Luminous became one of the most popular classes due to its satisfying light/dark toggle mechanic. Magnus became a key mid-game boss milestone.

name: RED
description: RED (Reboot, Evolution, Delight) brings a massive revamp to the original Explorer classes, making them competitive with newer classes. Zero, a unique dual-character class using Alpha and Beta forms, is also introduced.
description_ko: RED(Reboot, Evolution, Delight) 업데이트로 오리지널 모험가 직업이 대규모 리뉴얼되어 신규 직업과 경쟁력을 갖추게 되었다. 알파와 베타 두 형태를 전환하는 독특한 듀얼 캐릭터 직업 제로도 등장했다.
community_impact: Explorers felt fresh and powerful again, bringing many players back to their original mains. Zero's tag-team mechanic was innovative and the class developed a dedicated fanbase.

name: Black Heaven
description: MapleStory's first major blockbuster storyline. An epic multi-act narrative featuring an aerial battle against the Black Wings' massive airship Black Heaven. Introduced cinematic storytelling with voice acting and cutscenes.
description_ko: 메이플스토리 최초의 대규모 블록버스터 스토리라인. 블랙윙의 거대 비행선 블랙헤븐에 맞서는 공중전을 다룬 다막극 서사가 펼쳐졌다. 성우 연기와 컷신을 갖춘 시네마틱 스토리텔링이 도입되었다.
community_impact: Proved that MapleStory could tell compelling, cinematic stories. The Lotus boss fight became iconic, and Black Heaven set the standard for future blockbuster content. Many consider it the peak of MapleStory storytelling.

name: Heroes of Maple
description: The sequel blockbuster to Black Heaven. The six Heroes unite to face Damien, the Demon Slayer's corrupted brother, in a storyline that deepens the lore around the Heroes and the Black Mage's commanders.
description_ko: 블랙헤븐의 후속 블록버스터. 6명의 영웅이 데몬슬레이어의 타락한 형제 데미안에 맞서 힘을 합치는 스토리라인으로, 영웅들과 검은 마법사 군단장에 대한 세계관이 깊어졌다.
key_changes: Six Heroes unite in blockbuster story
community_impact: The emotional storyline around Damien and his connection to Demon Slayer resonated deeply. Absolab equipment became a key mid-game progression milestone that lasted for years.

name: 5th Job
description: 5th Job advancement arrives with the V Matrix system. Players at level 200+ can now obtain powerful new skills through Nodes. The Arcane River region begins with Vanishing Journey, introducing Arcane Power as a new progression system.
description_ko: V 매트릭스 시스템과 함께 5차 전직이 도입되었다. 레벨 200 이상 플레이어가 노드를 통해 강력한 신규 스킬을 획득할 수 있게 되었다. 소멸의 여로를 시작으로 아케인 리버 지역이 열리며 새로운 진행 시스템인 아케인 포스가 도입되었다.
key_changes: Arcane River begins with Vanishing Journey
community_impact: Completely redefined the endgame. Level 200 shifted from being the ultimate goal to just the beginning. The V Matrix gave players deep customization options and Arcane River became the definitive post-200 experience.

name: Arcane River
description: The Arcane River expands with new regions: Chu Chu Island, Lachelein, Arcana, Morass, and eventually Esfera. Each area features unique storylines, daily quests, and Arcane Symbols for progression toward the Black Mage confrontation.
description_ko: 아케인 리버가 츄츄 아일랜드, 레헬른, 아르카나, 모라스, 에스페라 등 새로운 지역으로 확장되었다. 각 지역은 독특한 스토리라인, 일일 퀘스트, 검은 마법사 대결을 위한 아케인 심볼 진행 시스템을 갖추었다.
key_changes: Chu Chu Island, Lachelein, Arcana, Morass, Esfera regions
key_changes_ko: 츄츄 아일랜드, 레헬른, 아르카나, 모라스, 에스페라 지역
community_impact: Daily quests became a core part of the MapleStory routine, for better or worse. Lucid became one of the most iconic bosses with her dream-themed mechanics. The grind to max Arcane Symbols defined the endgame for years.

name: Black Mage
description: The culmination of over a decade of storyline. The Black Mage, MapleStory's ultimate villain, is finally confronted in a massive server-wide raid event. Tenebris region opens as the final chapter. The Black Mage battle requires coordination across multiple parties.
description_ko: 10년 이상의 스토리라인의 결정판. 메이플스토리 최종 빌런인 검은 마법사와의 전서버 레이드 이벤트가 펼쳐졌다. 테네브리스 지역이 최종 챕터로 오픈되었다. 검은 마법사 전투는 다수의 파티 간 협동이 필요했다.
community_impact: A legendary moment in MapleStory history. Servers came together for the first time in years, and clearing the Black Mage became the ultimate achievement. The event was emotional for long-time players who had followed the story since beta.

name: Glory
description: Post-Black Mage era begins. Pathfinder, Hoyoung (a Taoist sage from Grandis), and Adele (a knight of the High Flora) are released as new classes. The story begins shifting toward the Grandis dimension and new threats.
description_ko: 검은 마법사 이후의 시대가 시작되었다. 패스파인더, 그란디스의 도사 호영, 하이 플로라의 기사 아델이 새로운 직업으로 출시되었다. 스토리가 그란디스 차원과 새로운 위협으로 전환되기 시작했다.
key_changes: Hoyoung: Taoist sage with fan and scroll
Adele: High Flora knight with floating swords
Grandis becomes focus of new narrative
key_changes_ko: 아델: 플로팅 소드의 하이 플로라 기사
community_impact: Hoyoung became massively popular in KMS thanks to its Korean cultural theming and flashy skills. Adele was praised for powerful and satisfying gameplay. The shift to Grandis storyline created excitement for new lore.

name: Awake
description: All classes receive enhanced 5th Job skills called AWAKE skills. Each class gets a unique cinematic and upgraded abilities. Includes quality of life improvements and further story development in the Grandis arc.
description_ko: 전 직업이 어웨이크 스킬이라 불리는 강화된 5차 스킬을 받았다. 각 직업별 고유 시네마틱과 업그레이드된 능력이 추가되었다. 편의성 개선과 그란디스 아크의 스토리 진행도 포함되었다.
key_changes: New AWAKE skills for all classes
community_impact: Players appreciated the love given to every class. The individual class cinematics made each class feel special and renewed interest in maining specific characters.

name: DESTINY
description: A massive remaster of the entire MapleStory experience. Adventurer (Explorer) classes receive complete redesigns with new animations and skill effects. Server infrastructure improvements, progression system overhauls, and a renewed focus on the new player experience.
description_ko: 메이플스토리 전체 경험의 대규모 리마스터. 모험가 직업군이 새로운 애니메이션과 스킬 이펙트로 완전히 재디자인되었다. 서버 인프라 개선, 진행 시스템 개편, 신규 유저 경험에 대한 새로운 집중이 이루어졌다.
community_impact: Widely praised as one of the best updates in years. Long-time Explorer mains were thrilled with the modernized skills. The update brought back many lapsed players and was seen as MapleStory's renaissance.

name: Ignition / 6th Job
description: 6th Job advancement introduces the HEXA Matrix system. Players can now enhance their core skills to HEXA level, unlocking devastating new abilities. Mastery Cores and Skill Cores provide deep customization for endgame progression.
description_ko: 6차 전직과 함께 헥사 매트릭스 시스템이 도입되었다. 핵심 스킬을 헥사 레벨로 강화하여 강력한 신규 능력을 해금할 수 있게 되었다. 마스터리 코어와 스킬 코어가 엔드게임 진행에 깊은 커스터마이징을 제공했다.
key_changes: New HEXA skill effects and animations
Sol Erda as new progression resource
community_impact: HEXA skills brought a new level of power fantasy to every class. The system was praised for its depth and customization options. Sol Erda grinding became the new daily endgame activity.

name: New Age
description: Major Grandis expansion with new regions and storyline progression. The battle against the Grandis enemies intensifies. New areas open in the Grandis continent, expanding the post-Arcane River endgame content significantly.
description_ko: 그란디스 대규모 확장과 새로운 지역 및 스토리라인 진행. 그란디스 적과의 전투가 심화되었다. 그란디스 대륙에 새로운 지역이 열리며 아케인 리버 이후의 엔드게임 콘텐츠가 크게 확장되었다.
community_impact: Kept the momentum from DESTINY and Ignition going strong. The Grandis storyline deepened, giving endgame players more meaningful content to work toward. The power scaling continued to evolve.

name: Dreamer
description: The latest major update continuing MapleStory's evolution. Features new content, class balancing, system improvements, and further expansion of the Grandis narrative. Quality of life updates and new progression paths for both new and veteran players.
description_ko: 메이플스토리의 진화를 이어가는 최신 대규모 업데이트. 새로운 콘텐츠, 직업 밸런싱, 시스템 개선, 그란디스 서사의 추가 확장이 포함되었다. 신규 및 베테랑 유저 모두를 위한 편의성 업데이트와 새로운 진행 경로가 제공되었다.
key_changes: New progression paths for all player levels
key_changes_ko: 모든 레벨 유저를 위한 새로운 진행 경로
community_impact: Continued MapleStory's strong streak of updates. The game felt healthier than ever with consistent improvements to both content and systems, maintaining a growing and engaged player base.
